modalSubtitle: Connect Stripe or Paystack to accept payments
errorEmailMissing: Account email not found. Please update your profile.
errorRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
errorMpesaPhone: Please enter your M-Pesa phone number
errorBankFields: Please select a bank and enter your account number
errorGeneric: Failed to set up payment provider
successPaystack: Payment setup complete! M-Pesa & cards are now enabled.
mpesaPhoneHint: This number will receive settlements and be used to prompt M-Pesa payments from customers at the POS
hintStripe: 1. Fill in details → 2. Continue to Stripe → 3. Complete KYC → 4. Accept payments
hintPaystackMpesa: 1. Enter business details → 2. Connect M-Pesa number → 3. Cashiers can prompt M-Pesa payments from POS
hintPaystackBank: 1. Enter business details → 2. Select bank & account → 3. Cards enabled instantly
hintDefault: Select a country to see the setup flow for your region
fixSplitsSuccess: ✅ Splits fixed! Platform fee now active on all payments.
